post.description: Uses cookie `refresh_token` first. If absent, accepts JSON body.
Uses cookie `refresh_token` first. If absent, accepts JSON body.

429.description: Please wait before requesting a new code

400.description: Invalid request or thread not found

get.description: Returns the stream owned by the authenticated user with full management fields.
Returns only the fields needed to watch a stream. Use this when navigating from the stream list to the player.

400.description: Invalid request or thread not found

403.description: Forbidden or not the thread owner

post.summary: Setup live input (create Cloudflare RTMP endpoint)
post.description: Creates a Cloudflare Live Input for the stream and returns RTMP credentials. Idempotent — returns existing credentials if already set up.
Deletes the Cloudflare Live Input, clears RTMP credentials and resets live status. Call `/live-input` again to restart streaming.

get.description: Returns existing RTMP credentials. Requires `/live-input` to be called first.

post.description:
Public endpoint called by Cloudflare Stream on `live_input.connected` and `live_input.disconnected` events.
Secured via HMAC-SHA256 signature in the `Webhook-Signature` header (`time=<ts>,sig1=<hex>`).
**Not intended for direct frontend use.**

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Filter threads by authenticated user's role. Requires auth.

401.description: Unauthorized — required when role filter is used

409.description: Thread with this slug already exists

post.summary: Create article metadata for a publication

get.summary: Get article metadata for a publication

put.summary: Update article metadata for a publication

get.summary: Get ranking metadata for a publication

put.summary: Update ranking metadata for a publication

post.description: Casts a +1 or -1 vote. If the same value is submitted again, the vote is toggled off (deleted).

400.description: Invalid value or item not found

delete.summary: Remove vote from a ranking item

post.summary: Create review metadata for a publication

get.summary: Get review metadata for a publication

put.summary: Update review metadata for a publication

post.summary: Get presigned URL for R2 upload
post.description: Returns a presigned PUT URL for direct upload to Cloudflare R2 plus the final public file URL.
Owner only. Creates a chat for the given stream. Chat is enabled by default.

patch.description: Owner only. Toggle enabled or persist_messages.

delete.description: Owner only. Deletes chat and all messages immediately.

get.description: Returns messages ordered by newest first. Use cursor for pagination.

Upgrade to WebSocket. The handshake uses the same auth as the HTTP API: `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` or the `access_token` cookie. Browser clients should normally rely on the cookie. Client events: `chat.send`, `chat.ping`, `chat.leave`. Server events: `chat.ready` (includes current `viewers` count from stream presence), `chat.pong`, `chat.message.created`, `chat.error`, `chat.closed`.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query — matched against content and tags

get.description: Upgrade to WebSocket to observe stream viewer presence independently from chat. The handshake uses the same auth as the HTTP API: `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` or the `access_token` cookie. Browser clients should normally rely on the cookie. Client events: `viewers.ping`, `viewers.leave`. Server events: `viewers.ready`, `viewers.pong`, `viewers.update`, `viewers.error`, `viewers.closed`.

thread_id.description: ID of a thread to link to this stream. The authenticated user must be the thread creator.
ID of a thread to link to this stream. Pass null to unlink. The authenticated user must be the thread creator.

StreamViewerResponse.description: Viewer-only fields — enough to display and play back a stream.

playback_url.description: Signed HLS playback URL valid for 4 hours. Absent when live input is not configured. Pass directly to the HLS player — no additional auth needed.

StreamDashboardResponse.description: Full stream data for the owner's management dashboard.

playback_url.description: Signed HLS playback URL valid for 4 hours. Absent when live input is not configured. Pass directly to the HLS player — no additional auth needed.
Signed HLS playback URL valid for 4 hours. Pass directly to the HLS player — no additional auth needed.

slug.description: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only

role.description: Authenticated user's role in this thread. Null if not a member or unauthenticated.

stream_id.description: ID of the stream linked to this thread, if any.

is_live.description: True if the linked stream is currently live.

upload_url.description: Presigned PUT URL — upload file directly here

file_url.description: Final public URL of the uploaded file

persist_messages.description: If true, message history survives after stream ends

cursor.description: Pass as ?cursor= in next request to get older messages

clientMessageId.description: Optional client-side ID echoed back in `chat.message.created` when present

viewers.description: Current viewer count at the moment of connection

count.description: Current viewer count at the moment of connection

id.description: Existing item ID — pass on update to preserve votes. Omit or leave empty for new items.

no_negative_scores.description: If true, scores are clamped to 0 before being sent to the client
If true, scores are clamped to 0 before being sent to the client

score.description: Sum of all votes (+1/-1) on this item

user_vote.description: Authenticated user's vote on this item. Null if not voted or unauthenticated.

title.description: First sentence of the publication content
